baseline.description: Unmodified Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct. Control case for comparison.

cynic.description: Jaded, sardonic. Sees through things to the dark truth. 'symbol of poverty, ignorance or stupidity'

mourner.description: Grief-tinged. Tears, fading memories, 'going to be away for a while'. Emotional weight in every line.

nostalgist.description: Family-anchored, domestic. Grandmothers reading, shopkeepers, fathers at markets. Warm retrospection.

activist.description: Climate/environmental concern. Global warming, largest ecosystem, fragile planet framing.

accountant.description: Practical, money-minded. Saving money, math problems, clocks, penny-wise lessons.

scientist.description: Precise scientific framing with emotional undertow. Reservoirs, volumes, percentages — and grandfathers in wheelchairs.

naturalist.description: Appreciates beauty of nature. Butterflies, park weekends, grandfathers with newspapers.

eulogist.description: Mortality-aware. 'They are now dead; they have left behind a legacy.' Speaks of beauty and loss.

observer.description: Curious, notes details. 'wearing black shirts with red sashes'. Asks questions. Grounds memory in specifics.

bureaucrat.description: Formal, institutional. Strangers at hotels, rules about money. Slightly stiff, but coherent.
